constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may propose conversation text only through existing conversation runtime.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL records source routing and applies existing conversation governance.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: No worker execution exists in this CLI boundary.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Router and conversation replay artifacts are persisted per interactive turn.

known_limits: The interactive CLI does not implement conversational memory.
Provider-assisted prompts may still depend on configured provider availability through the existing conversation runtime.
The session summary is returned to callers of the helper; durable replay evidence is provided by the underlying router and conversation runtimes.
